story.title: Your 'app' could have been a webpage (so I fixed it for you)

draft:
I just read about a developer who's calling out unnecessary native apps by rebuilding them as webpages. 
He's making a point about the trend of wrapping web views in native code. 
His examples highlight the simplicity of web development. 
What's the threshold for choosing native over web for your projects?
#webdevelopment #nativeapps #softwareengineering
